name: sidekick
description: Sidekick — local-first admin PWA. api/ holds the small set of Vercel serverless functions the app opts into for the LINE integration (booking availability/request, LINE webhook); the app itself has no build step and no dependencies of its own. Deliberately left without "type": "module" — Node's native require(esm) interop already loads the ESM `export default` syntax in api/*.js and lib/*.js fine without that flag.
